meta.title: Money Quest — money skills as a game
meta.description: Telegram Mini App: learn money management through timed periods, choices, and consequences — in a safe sandbox.

hero.title: Money skills as a game
hero.subtitle: Play through simulated “months”: a timer, decisions, events, and period close — with zero risk to your real wallet.

how.title: The loop in one minute
how.subtitle: One game month = limited time + explicit actions + period close with consequences.

steps.title: The period runs
steps.text: A countdown sets the pace. Pause keeps progress — no need to stare at the screen for hours.

steps.title: You decide
steps.text: Salary on tap, safety fund, assets, liabilities, and choice events — each action moves the balance.

steps.title: The month closes
steps.text: Payments, overdue amounts, asset income, and the period summary. Mistakes sting but stay educational.

learn.title: What the simulation teaches
learn.subtitle: Not a slide course — a habit of thinking about money through outcomes.

cards.title: Safety fund
cards.text: Why to save when cash feels tight.

cards.title: Obligations
cards.text: Payments and overdue — clear, without jargon for its own sake.

cards.title: Events
cards.text: Choices with consequences, not a “pick the right quiz answer” test.

cards.title: Discipline
cards.text: Income doesn’t auto-deposit — miss an action in a period, and it shows.

peek.title: In-game UI
peek.subtitle: MQX layer on Telegram: one visual language across dashboard, finance, and events.

game.title: Game
game.text: Start from a scenario template — jump into a run without manual setup of every parameter.

plan.title: Plan
plan.text: Your scenario and expense planning — for conscious “what if” play.

partners.title: Partners & investors
partners.subtitle: Money Quest is edutainment in Telegram: short sessions, growing content depth, and a clear learning frame.

points.title: Market
points.text: Financial literacy for ages 14–35: gaming habits plus demand for useful, non-dry learning.

points.title: Product
points.text: Period core loop, starter templates, events, investments and insurance MVP — unified server-side economy.

points.title: Monetization
points.text: Game / Plan modes, difficulty templates, expandable content — details on request.

points.title: Compliance
points.text: Educational simulation, not investment advice; tone without scare tactics or predatory lending glam.

partners.contactNote: Set a contact email in landing/locales or replace data-contact-href in index.html.

items.a: No. All amounts and operations live inside the game simulation.
A typical visit is a few minutes; a full run spans several game “months” as interest grows.
Yes. Losing is part of learning — outcomes are visible in numbers and period summaries.
No. The product is educational; real-life decisions are yours alone.

items.q: When can I try it on Telegram?
items.a: Public Mini App launch is in preparation; this site does not link to the bot yet.

footer.legal: Not individual investment advice. A learning simulation.
